founder.title: A Message From Our Founder
founder.p1: Although I am a pharmacist with a Master's degree in Pharmaceutical Chemistry, my heart has always been devoted to helping animals in need.
founder.p2: My journey began through volunteering in Greece and Cyprus, where I adopted my dog Kobe and later became a volunteer at the non-profit UANA Foundation, helping dogs in municipal pounds find loving homes. Through these experiences, I saw both the incredible dedication of the animal welfare community and the everyday challenges pet owners face, including the growing cost of caring for their pets.
founder.p3: Wooffy App was created to bring pet lovers and pet businesses together in one supportive community, helping pet owners save money on pet expenses while also supporting animal shelters.
founder.p4: Built with love and purpose, Wooffy aims to make pet care easier, more connected, and more compassionate for everyone.
founder.see: Will see you inside the app ❤️

getListed.subtitle: No sign-up, no account, no fees. Just fill in a quick form and we'll add your dog-friendly place to our directory after a quick review.

affiliateInquiry.submitFailed: Failed to submit. Please try again or email us directly.

validation.fullNameMax: Name must be less than 100 characters
validation.emailMax: Email must be less than 255 characters
validation.phoneMax: Phone number must be less than 20 characters
validation.messageMax: Message must be less than 1000 characters

shelterApply.title: Apply as a Shelter Partner
shelterApply.description: Join our whitelist and share in 10% of all Wooffy membership proceeds, split amongst our shelter partners. Fill out the form below and we'll review your application.
shelterApply.tellAboutPlaceholder: Describe your mission, services, and why you'd like to partner with Wooffy...
shelterApply.next1: We'll review your application within 5 business days
shelterApply.next2: If approved, you'll share in 10% of all membership proceeds (split amongst all partner shelters)
shelterApply.next3: Your shelter will be featured on our website
shelterApply.loginRequired: Please log in to submit an application
shelterApply.submitFailed: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
shelterApply.submitted: Application submitted! We'll review your application and get back to you within 5 business days.
shelterApply.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

communityQuestionDialogs.acceptDescription: This will mark your question as resolved and highlight this answer as the solution.
communityQuestionDialogs.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete your question and all its answers. This action cannot be undone.

memberUpgrade.metaDescription: Premium plans are coming soon to Wooffy.
memberUpgrade.title: Something Exciting is Coming! 🐾
memberUpgrade.subtitle: Premium plans are on their way! We're working hard to bring you exclusive discounts, AI health assistant, pet birthday offers and much more.
memberUpgrade.enjoyHeading: In the meantime, enjoy your free features:
memberUpgrade.feature1Desc: Create and manage profiles for your pets
memberUpgrade.feature3Desc: Report and search for lost or found pets
memberUpgrade.promise: We'll notify you as soon as premium plans are available!

redemptionHistory.metaDescription: View your Wooffy redemption history and track your savings.
redemptionHistory.pageSubtitle: Track your savings and see how much you've benefited from Wooffy
redemptionHistory.emptyDesc: Start using your Wooffy card at partner businesses to see your history here

partnerRegister.exitDescription: You will be signed out, but don't worry — your account is saved. When you sign back in with the same email and password, you'll return to this form to complete your business profile.
partnerRegister.otherTypeLabel: What type of business or service? *
partnerRegister.otherTypePlaceholder: e.g., Pet Photography, Dog Walking, Pet Transport...
partnerRegister.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell pet owners about your services...
partnerRegister.storeLocationsHelp: Add your store locations with their specific address and phone number.
partnerRegister.contactEmailTooltip: This email will be shown on your public business profile so customers can contact you. By default, we use your login email. If you'd prefer a different customer-facing email (e.g. info@yourbusiness.com), click the link below to add one.
partnerRegister.useDifferentEmail: Use a different email for customers?
partnerRegister.webSocialTooltip: Provide at least one link so customers can find you online. This can be a website or any social media profile.
partnerRegister.webSocialHelp: Add at least one: website or social media link.
partnerRegister.name: Name:
partnerRegister.verificationDesc: Your application will be reviewed by our team within 2-3 business days. You'll receive an email once approved.
partnerRegister.applicationSubmittedDesc: Your partner application is now under review. We'll notify you once approved.

verifyEmail.checkDesc: We've sent you a verification link. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your email before signing in.
verifyEmail.checkSpam: Don't see it? Check your spam folder.
verifyEmail.failedFallback: Failed to verify email. Please try again.
verifyEmail.failedExpired: Verification failed. The link may be expired or invalid.
verifyEmail.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
verifyEmail.verifiedWithEmail: Your email <1>{{email}}</1> has been verified successfully.
verifyEmail.verifiedNoEmail: Your email has been verified successfully.
verifyEmail.roleBusiness: Log in now to set up your business profile and start reaching pet owners across Cyprus!
verifyEmail.roleShelter: Log in now to set up your shelter profile and connect with potential adopters!
verifyEmail.roleMember: You can now log in to explore your dashboard and start enjoying exclusive pet-parent perks.
verifyEmail.ctaBusiness: Log In & Set Up Your Business
verifyEmail.ctaShelter: Log In & Set Up Your Shelter
verifyEmail.savedNote: Your account is saved — you can always come back and log in later to finish setup.

resetPassword.linkExpiredDefault: The reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.passwordResetDesc: Your password has been successfully updated. Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.passwordMax: Password must be less than 128 characters
resetPassword.passwordUpdatedDesc: Your password has been successfully reset.
resetPassword.errorDesc: Something went wrong. Please try again.

petHealthAssistantUI.metaDescription: Get instant pet advice from our AI-powered assistant.
petHealthAssistantUI.title: Wooffy Assistant
petHealthAssistantUI.subtitle: Ask me anything about your pet! 🐾
petHealthAssistantUI.howCanIHelpDesc: Ask me about pet health, nutrition, behavior, or any concerns you have about your furry friend.
petHealthAssistantUI.disclaimer: Wooffy is an AI assistant and cannot replace professional veterinary care. For emergencies, please contact your vet immediately.
petHealthAssistantUI.errorMessage: I'm sorry, I encountered an error. Please try again in a moment. 🐾
petHealthAssistantUI.suggestedQ1: What vaccines does my pet need?
petHealthAssistantUI.suggestedQ2: How often should I groom my pet?
petHealthAssistantUI.suggestedQ3: My pet is scratching a lot, what could it be?

termsPage.metaDescription: Read the Terms and Conditions, Privacy Policy, and Shelter Participation Agreement for Wooffy.App.

partnersSection.title: Our Partner Network
partnersSection.description: From local pet shops to premium hotels, our network keeps growing. Show your Wooffy card and enjoy instant savings everywhere.

hubSection.title: Your Pet Owner Hub
hubSection.description: More than just discounts. Wooffy is your all-in-one companion for pet parenthood. Connect, discover, and make every moment with your pet count.
hubSection.ctaHelp: All Wooffy members get early access to new features

events.title: Events & Meetups
events.desc: Discover and join local pet events, dog walks, training sessions, and community gatherings.

forum.title: Community Forum
forum.desc: Connect with fellow pet parents. Share tips, ask questions, and build friendships.

directory.title: Dog-Friendly Directory
directory.desc: Find dog parks, dog-friendly restaurants, and hidden gems in your area.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.desc: Never miss vaccinations, grooming appointments, or your pet's special days.

testimonialsSection.title: What Our Members Say
testimonialsSection.description: Join the Wooffy family of happy pet parents who are saving money and building community.

birthdayOfferModal.title: Send Birthday Offer
birthdayOfferModal.description: Create a special birthday message for {{petName}}
birthdayOfferModal.messageHelp: This message will be sent as a notification to the pet owner. The offer is valid for 30 days.
birthdayOfferModal.defaultMessage:
🎂 Happy Birthday, {{petName}}! 🎉

To celebrate this special day, we'd like to offer you {{discount}} your next visit at {{businessName}}.

We hope to see you soon! 🐾
birthdayOfferModal.toastSentDesc: {{owner}} will receive your birthday message for {{petName}}.

birthdayOfferView.title: Birthday Offer
birthdayOfferView.subtitle: Special offer for {{petName}}'s birthday
birthdayOfferView.instructions: 💡 Show this message to the business when you visit to redeem your birthday offer!

cityMultiSelect.noneSelected: No locations selected. Select at least one city or area.
